en_title: Nintendo Removes Hidden The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Switch 2 Description That Suggested It's a Faithful Remake
cn_title: 《塞尔达传说 时之笛》任天堂删除《时之笛》描述，暗示忠实重制
subtitle: 原汁原味？
opus_summary: 任天堂在《塞尔达传说 时之笛》Switch 2产品页代码中隐藏了一段描述，称其为「N64经典完全重制」，玩法保持「永恒」。描述中还提到「惊艳视觉效果、更新设计」。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has removed a hidden description for its new The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time Switch 2 remake, that fans say pointed to a faithful update of the N64 original.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂移除了自家新版《塞尔达传说 时之笛》Switch 2重制版的一段隐藏描述，粉丝们认为这段描述表明本作将是对N64原版的一次忠实更新。

paragraphs.en: A short description of the game was spotted by eagle-eyed Nintendo followers within website code for Zelda's Switch 2 product page. But just as fans began debating its meaning online, the page's code was updated — and the description was removed.
paragraphs.cn: 眼尖的任天堂追随者在《塞尔达》Switch 2产品页面的网站代码里发现了一段简短的游戏描述。然而就在粉丝们刚刚开始在网上争论其含义时，页面代码被更新——描述也被移除了。

paragraphs.en: Announced during last week's Nintendo Direct broadcast following an earlier leak and huge amounts of speculation, little is known about the Switch 2's new Ocarina of Time version. Nintendo itself chose to keep the project mysterious when announcing its first teaser trailer — which then only lasted a matter of seconds.
paragraphs.cn: 该版本在上周的任天堂直面会直播中公布，此前曾经历泄露和大量猜测。关于Switch 2的《时之笛》新版本，目前外界所知甚少。任天堂在公布首个预告短片时也刻意保持神秘，那支预告片仅持续了短短几秒。

paragraphs.en: Fan saw glimpses of a tapestry and then a single shot of a sleeping young Link, as a Triforce mark appeared on his hand. The clip established the game's art style — but little else. Fans were left to ponder whether this new version of the game would be a full reimagining (akin to how Capcom has revisited Resident Evil games, or Square Enix's treatment of Final Fantasy 7) or something similar to a shot-for-shot remake. Now, fans say that deleted description suggests more of the latter option.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们先是看到一幅挂毯的若干画面，随后出现了一个沉睡的年轻林克的镜头，此时他手背上出现了三角力量的印记。这段影像确立了游戏的美术风格，但也仅此而已。粉丝们只能琢磨这个新版究竟会像卡普空重制《生化危机》系列或史克威尔艾尼克斯对待《最终幻想7》那样进行全面重塑，还是会接近于逐镜头重制。如今，粉丝们认为被删除的描述更倾向于后者。

paragraphs.en: "The N64 classic reborn as a full remake for Nintendo Switch 2," the description read. "Experience Ocarina of Time with stunning visuals, updated designs, and timeless gameplay."
paragraphs.cn: 「N64经典在Switch 2上重生为完全重制版，」描述写道，「以惊艳的视觉效果、更新的设计以及永恒的游戏性，体验《时之笛》。」

paragraphs.en: Fans have suggested that the mention of timeless gameplay here signifies a general experience — your path through Hyrule and its dungeons, its puzzles and secrets — that will feel familiar to those who played the original game, rather than something that takes the original and builds upon it.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们认为，这里提及的「永恒的游戏性」表明整体游戏体验——你穿越海拉鲁大陆、深入地下城、解开谜题与秘密的旅程——会让玩过原版的玩家感到熟悉，而不是在原作基础上进行扩展。

paragraphs.en: Of course, Ocarina of Time will follow another ground-up N64 game remake coming to Switch 2 this year: Star Fox. For that project, Nintendo has kept gameplay similar but added in some significantly expanded plot sequences. It remains to be seen if Nintendo will do similar in Ocarina.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，《塞尔达传说 时之笛》将是继今年另一款N64游戏完全重制作品《星际火狐》之后登陆Nintendo Switch 2的。对于《星际火狐》，任天堂保持了玩法相似，但加入了一些大幅扩展的剧情片段。任天堂是否会在《时之笛》中也这么做，还有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Fans have also noted how Ocarina's trailer begins with a voiceover — and suggested voice acted dialogue will play more of a part in this remake. But this remains to be seen.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝还注意到《时之笛》的预告片以旁白开场，并认为配音对话将在这个重制版中发挥更大作用。但这还有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo has since changed the description to a more generic blurb, which offers no further clues at all: "The Nintendo 64 classic returns for a new generation in 2026, reborn exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2!"
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂后来将描述改成了更通用的简介，没有提供任何进一步线索：「这款N64经典之作将于2026年面向新一代重生，独占登陆Nintendo Switch 2！」

paragraphs.en: More details of the game will be revealed later this year, with Zelda: Ocarina of Time still sat with a vague "2026" launch date for now. Last week, former Nintendo staff suggested the company should have changed its plans to unveil the game , after its leak left the eventual unveiling feeling more like a "foregone conclusion."
paragraphs.cn: 游戏的更多细节将在今年晚些时候公布，《塞尔达传说 时之笛》目前仍只有一个模糊的「2026」发售日期。上周，前任天堂员工表示，在游戏泄露导致最终公布更像是「预料之中」后，公司本应改变公布计划。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。您可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。

translated_terms.The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time: 塞尔达传说 时之笛
